completed_slices.summary: Centralized run progress persistence behind ProgressReporter/ProgressScope and refactored shell command streaming into ShellCommandMonitor while preserving status/watch behavior, bounded progress tails, cancellation handling, and stdout/stderr results.
acceptance_status: complete: Live progress state/event persistence is centralized in ProgressReporter/ProgressScope.
complete: Shell command monitoring is centralized in ShellCommandMonitor; progress tail remains bounded and stdout/stderr are preserved.
complete: status --run and watch --run public behavior/schema unchanged; existing integration coverage passes.
complete: No global workflow timeout added; per-command timeout guardrails unchanged.
complete: Existing tests pass; live progress during long verification remains covered by integration test and shell streaming has added unit coverage.

integration_repair.summary: Integration repair pass completed; no cross-slice or verification breakage found, and the worktree is clean.
